challenge.title: Korak 32
challenge.description:
Sada kada je klasa MediaError gotova, modifikujte izjavu if u metodi add. Zamenite TypeError sa MediaError koristeći istu poruku.

Takođe, prosledite media_item kao drugi argument nakon poruke. Ovo će vam omogućiti da sačuvate element koji uzrokuje grešku u objektu izuzetka (exception object).

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should raise a MediaError with the message Only Movie or TVSeries instances can be added when media_item is not an instance of Movie or its subclasses.
You should pass in media_item as the second argument to MediaError.
You should not raise a MediaError when media_item is a valid item.

challengeFiles.name: main
